name: RS232OnSend
title: RS232OnSend
syntax: RS232OnSend( dword port, byte buffer[], dword number );
description: Callback handler for completion of send operation to a serial port.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: A number between 1 and 255 identifying a serial port.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: The buffer given to the send call.

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: The number of bytes which have been sent.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
